findings.evidence: `rg -n "map_of_invariant|isMaximalTotallyReal_of|totally real|Lagrangian"` shows the new `map_of_invariant` declarations only in `LagrangianTotallyReal.lean` lines 86 and 131; roadmap lines 81-83 and 224-227 emphasize keeping totally real/Lagrangian and tame/compatible hypotheses separate and needing `T_α` only as totally real with a taming form.
findings.fix: Remove these declarations from this PR, or make any proof-only helper private and add them later under a target that actually needs invariance of `J`-images.
findings.issue: `IsIsotropic.map_of_invariant` and the dependent public theorem `IsLagrangian.map_of_invariant` expose a separate invariance-stability API for `J(L)`, while the roadmap target only needs the tame/compatible bridge from Lagrangian subspaces to maximal totally real boundary data.

summary: The main Lagrangian-to-maximal-totally-real API is present, but the PR exposes parallel invariance lemmas that are outside the named downstream target and not needed to characterize the new bridge.
